sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109507" key="u(po/fimos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπόφῑμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n109507.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">covered with a lid,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔλαιον</foreign> Zos.Alch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:p.114" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.114</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:p.165B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.165B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
